task_completion.description: Configure 'passengerClass' as an Ordinal variable with levels ordered 3rd, 2nd, 1st.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Data tab or variable editor, 'passengerClass' has the ordinal measurement level icon, and the levels are explicitly ordered starting with '3rd', then '2nd', then '1st'.

task_completion.description: Set up the Ordinal Logistic Regression with the correct variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi analysis panel for Ordinal Logistic Regression, 'passengerClass' is in the Dependent Variable box, 'sex' is in the Factors box, and 'age' is in the Covariates box.

task_completion.description: Enable Odds Ratios in the Model Coefficients options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Odds Ratios' checkbox is ticked under the Model Coefficients section in the analysis options, or the resulting Model Coefficients table includes a column specifically labeled 'Odds Ratio'.

task_completion.description: Save the Jamovi project as Titanic_Ordinal.omv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window title displays 'Titanic_Ordinal.omv' or a file explorer window shows the file 'Titanic_Ordinal.omv' saved in the /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report with the required age statistics and interpretation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) is open showing a file named 'ordinal_results.txt' containing exactly three lines: a numeric value for the age Odds Ratio, a numeric value for the age p-value, and the word 'Increase' or 'Decrease'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jamovi graphical interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or R/Python scripts running the regression.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by Jamovi.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results panel in Jamovi displays properly formatted tables for Ordinal Logistic Regression, not manually typed text or pasted images.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create the final report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text report is visible in a standard text editor interface (like gedit, mousepad, or nano) rather than just being echoed to the terminal.
